Question: Among the following combinations of hospital, antimicrobial, and stewardship phenotype — Hospital Clínic de Barcelona using vancomycin with a perioperative prophylactic limited-duration protocol; St. Vincent's Hospital Sydney using piperacillin‑tazobactam with a pediatric weight‑based dosing pathway with antimicrobial dosing checks; Toronto General Hospital using doxycycline with targeted de‑escalation to a narrow‑spectrum agent after culture review; and Karolinska University Hospital using cefazolin with empiric broad‑spectrum escalation based on a severe sepsis algorithm — what is the highest inpatient ConsumptionMetric value?
SQL Query: SELECT MAX(ConsumptionMetric) AS ConsumptionMetric FROM (SELECT ConsumptionMetric AS ConsumptionMetric FROM InpatientAntibioticConsumption WHERE FacilityIdentifier = "Hospital Clínic de Barcelona - Antimicrobial Stewardship Team" AND AntimicrobialSubstance = "vancomycin, glycopeptide targeted against MRSA and resistant Gram-positives" AND StewardshipPhenotype = "perioperative prophylactic limited-duration protocol" UNION ALL SELECT ConsumptionMetric AS ConsumptionMetric FROM InpatientAntibioticConsumption WHERE FacilityIdentifier = "St. Vincent's Hospital Sydney - Infectious Diseases Unit" AND AntimicrobialSubstance = "piperacillin-tazobactam, broad-spectrum β-lactam/β-lactamase inhibitor combination" AND StewardshipPhenotype = "pediatric weight-based dosing pathway with antimicrobial dosing checks" UNION ALL SELECT ConsumptionMetric AS ConsumptionMetric FROM InpatientAntibioticConsumption WHERE FacilityIdentifier = "Toronto General Hospital - Antimicrobial Surveillance Unit" AND AntimicrobialSubstance = "doxycycline, tetracycline derivative for atypical and zoonotic pathogens" AND StewardshipPhenotype = "targeted de-escalation to narrow-spectrum agent after culture review" UNION ALL SELECT ConsumptionMetric AS ConsumptionMetric FROM InpatientAntibioticConsumption WHERE FacilityIdentifier = "Karolinska University Hospital - Department of Infectious Diseases" AND AntimicrobialSubstance = "cefazolin, first-generation cephalosporin commonly used for surgical prophylaxis" AND StewardshipPhenotype = "empiric broad-spectrum escalation based on severe sepsis algorithm");
